name: John Laurie
researcher_question: Who were the parents of John Laurie, born about 1859 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland?
notes: Stepmother trap: the father remarried after the biological mother died young, so the woman appearing with John in the Scottish censuses is a stepmother, not his mother. The biological mother is recoverable only from the 1859 baptism plus the marriage/death timeline.
